center.name: Charles Henry Tilson Marshall
center.summary: Charles Henry Tilson Marshall是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括白颊山鹧鸪，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The white-cheeked partridge (Arborophila atrogularis) is a species of partridge in the family Phasianidae, native to Asia
